templates.name: Hello Kitty
templates.description: A full kawaii birthday experience! Animated love letter, interactive cake-cutting, candle wish moment, memory match game, flip cards with hidden messages, and a final sealed letter. Adorable and absolutely iconic.

templates.name: Harry Potter
templates.description: Welcome to Hogwarts! Sideways story panels, flip memory cards, Wizard Word Hunt puzzle, Sorting Hat quiz, scratch-to-reveal birthday wish, and a final letter delivered by owl. Pure magic.

templates.name: Fully Custom Theme
templates.description: Don't want to follow a template? This is for you. We'll build a completely custom surprise website according to your specific themes, games, and layout ideas. Share your vision, and we'll bring it to life from scratch.
templates.longDesc:
Our Fully Custom Theme is a blank canvas. Unlike standard templates, this service involves direct collaboration with our designers. We can include custom games, unique animations, and multi-page storytelling tailored exactly to your recipient's personality. This is the ultimate pookie surprise.

Note: This is a bespoke service. Payment is required only after we handover the final link to you.
features: ⏳ Instant delivery NOT available (Requires 24-48h Build time)
